solution:
# PROJECT ANALYSIS

## 1. WHAT THIS PROJECT/SYSTEM IS
AI-powered DevOps automation tool with multi-agent architecture for infrastructure management, code analysis, and GitHub integration.

---

## 2. KEY COMPONENTS

| Component | Files | Purpose |
|-----------|-------|---------|
| **Core Engine** | brain.py, main.py, router.py | Agent orchestration & request routing |
| **Agents** | github.py, code_reader.py, terraform.py, kubernetes.py | Specialized task executors |
| **Memory/State** | memory.json (202KB), session.json (21KB), memory_store/ | Persistent context & session tracking |
| **Intelligence** | pr_risk.py, terraform_diff.py | Analysis & risk assessment |
| **Config** | .env, config.py, requirements.txt | Environment & dependencies |
| **CLI** | run.sh, ai.bat | Execution entry points |

---

## 3. ISSUES / RISKS

| Issue | Severity | Evidence |
|-------|----------|----------|
| **Memory bloat** | HIGH | memory.json = 202KB (single file); unbounded growth pattern |
| **Session fragmentation** | HIGH | sessions/ + memory_store/ + memory.json (3 storage layers) |
| **Stale session data** | MEDIUM | active.json = 67KB; sessions.index.json = 81 bytes (mismatch) |
| **No data retention policy** | HIGH | 4 memory_store JSON files with timestamps (1775456142 epoch) - unclear cleanup strategy |
| **Missing error handling** | MEDIUM | No error logs provided; executor.py (3.6KB
